title: Creative Writing Comments
description: Synthetic starter comment bank for testing creative-writing and creative-project review workflows.

comments.label: Voice is distinct
comments.text: The piece has a clear voice that fits the creative purpose.

comments.label: Voice needs focus
comments.text: Strengthen the voice by making the tone more consistent.

comments.label: Vivid detail
comments.text: The specific detail helps the reader picture the moment or idea.

comments.label: Add sensory detail
comments.text: Add one sensory or concrete detail to make this part more vivid.

comments.label: Revision choice visible
comments.text: A craft or revision choice is visible and supports the purpose.

comments.label: Craft target needed
comments.text: Choose one craft target to revise, such as pacing, structure, or description.
